name: Be Mine Buttermilk Cake (1 of 2)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chambord or other berry liqueur
1/2 cup (1 stick) Unsalted butter, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch round cake pan with the softened butter.
3. In a bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and sugar until well combined.
4. Add the chopped chocolate and mix until evenly distributed.
5. Stir in the egg yolks, cream, and buttermilk until smooth.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Melt the remaining butter and add the liqueur; pour this mixture over the batter.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
